languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

languages.text: "Ага, как же. На палубах и так не продохнуть от ваших "благовоний"! Если вас станет еще больше, остальных придется сервиторизировать, чтобы выдерживали этот смрад!"
"Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"
languages.original_text: "Ага, как же. На палубах и так не продохнуть от ваших "благовоний"! Если вас станет еще больше, остальных придется сервиторизировать, чтобы выдерживали этот смрад!"

traits.locale_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"
"Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"
"Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

languages.text: 「そう、そうだね！君の「香」でデッキでは息ができないよ！もし君たちが増えても、残りの我々は臭いを我慢するために、奴隷のように扱われることになるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: 「そう、そうだね！君の「香」でデッキでは息ができないよ！もし君たちが増えても、残りの我々は臭いを我慢するために、奴隷のように扱われることになるだろう！」

languages.text: « Non merci ! J'ai déjà l'impression d'étouffer à cause de votre "encens" qui envahit tous les ponts ! Si vous ramenez d'autres de vos acolytes, on devra tous se faire servitoriser rien que pour supporter cette puanteur ! »
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: « Non merci ! J'ai déjà l'impression d'étouffer à cause de votre "encens" qui envahit tous les ponts ! Si vous ramenez d'autres de vos acolytes, on devra tous se faire servitoriser rien que pour supporter cette puanteur ! »

languages.text: "Ja, alles klar! Ich kann an Deck wegen Eures 'Weihrauchs' kaum atmen! Wenn noch mehr von Euch hier auftauchen, muss der Rest von uns servitorisiert werden, um den Gestank zu ertragen!"
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: "Ja, alles klar! Ich kann an Deck wegen Eures 'Weihrauchs' kaum atmen! Wenn noch mehr von Euch hier auftauchen, muss der Rest von uns servitorisiert werden, um den Gestank zu ertragen!"

languages.text: "Hadi oradan! Mevcut hâlinizle bile 'tütsünüzden' güvertelerde nefes alamıyorum! Sizin gibi başkaları da gelirse sırf kokuya dayanabilelim diye hizmetörleştirilmek zorunda kalacağız!"
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: "Hadi oradan! Mevcut hâlinizle bile 'tütsünüzden' güvertelerde nefes alamıyorum! Sizin gibi başkaları da gelirse sırf kokuya dayanabilelim diye hizmetörleştirilmek zorunda kalacağız!"

languages.text: «¡Ya, claro! ¡Si apenas se puede respirar en cubierta con tanto "incienso"! ¡Como vengan más de los suyos, a los demás van a tener que convertirnos en servidores solo para soportar la peste!».
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Ya, claro! ¡Si apenas se puede respirar en cubierta con tanto "incienso"! ¡Como vengan más de los suyos, a los demás van a tener que convertirnos en servidores solo para soportar la peste!».

languages.text: “得了吧！光是你们现在的‘熏香’就呛得人在甲板上没法喘气了！要是你们再来更多人，我们其他人还不得全都变成机仆，才能忍受这股臭味！”
languages.original_text: "Yeah, right! I can't breathe on the decks from your 'incense' as it is! If more of you turn up, the rest of us will have to be servitorised just to endure the stench!"

traits.locale_text: “得了吧！光是你们现在的‘熏香’就呛得人在甲板上没法喘气了！要是你们再来更多人，我们其他人还不得全都变成机仆，才能忍受这股臭味！”
